name: covectra.com
message: [AI generated] Covectra is a company that specializes in advanced authentication, serialization, and track & trace technologies. They offer solutions designed to counteract counterfeit and illicit trade activities, ensuring product integrity in sectors like pharmaceuticals, food & beverage, agrochemicals, and luxury goods. Covectra's technology is designed with regulatory compliance in mind, helping organizations meet global security and safety requirements.
